title: CCIP-Read (for Geeks)
description: EIP-3668, commonly known as CCIP-Read, is a proposed protocol aimed at providing secure off-chain data retrieval. CCIP-Read introduces a standard set of rules and protocols to create a trusted environment for off-chain data reading, delivering a solution for the data interoperability issues that plague blockchain environments.
